relationships.relationship_description: Goldman Sachs Research provides estimates and coverage for MongoDB, and Goldman Sachs does and seeks to do business with companies covered in its research reports.
relationships.original_sentence: Source: Company data, Goldman Sachs Research estimates.

relationships.relationship_description: Larger enterprises are standardizing with strategic multi-year EA commitments and growing higher-for-longer.
relationships.original_sentence: The drivers: healthy Atlas consumption trends as more strategic workloads from larger enterprises grow higher-for-longer and customers standardize with strategic multi-year EA commitments.

relationships.relationship_description: MongoDB gained +2500 new Atlas customers and serves over 60K+ Atlas customers.
relationships.original_sentence: New logo activity stood out again with +2500 new Atlas customers (stable vs. F2Q) and well-above the +1800 baseline over the past three years, underscoring a strengthening PLG motion that could benefit further as MongoDB’s incremental Bay Area investments in developer awareness mature and MongoDB’s AI capabilities make their way to Community Edition.

relationships.relationship_description: AWS is a cloud platform provider for Atlas and was MongoDB's North America Partner of the Year in 2024, but also poses competitive pressure with native database offerings.
relationships.quantifier: North America Partner of the Year in 2024
relationships.original_sentence: Co-sell and marketplace momentum underscore this trajectory - MongoDB was AWS’s North America Partner of the Year in 2024 and Microsoft’s in 2025 - and the SSPL license (2018) continues to discourage direct reselling of the latest code.

relationships.relationship_description: Azure is a cloud platform provider for Atlas and Microsoft’s Partner of the Year in 2025, but also poses competitive pressure with native database offerings.
relationships.original_sentence: Co-sell and marketplace momentum underscore this trajectory - MongoDB was AWS’s North America Partner of the Year in 2024 and Microsoft’s in 2025 - and the SSPL license (2018) continues to discourage direct reselling of the latest code.

relationships.relationship_description: GCP is a cloud platform provider for Atlas, but also poses competitive pressure with native database offerings.
relationships.original_sentence: Atlas - the fully-managed, multi-cloud service across AWS, Azure, and GCP - has become the core monetization driver.

relationships.relationship_description: Postgres is an alternative database technology that competes with MongoDB for certain workloads, and its broader standardization could impact MongoDB’s win rates.
relationships.original_sentence: We see Postgres and MongoDB both gaining share in their respective lanes, not primarily from each other.

relationships.relationship_description: Snowflake is a data platform company and a peer in MongoDB's software coverage universe; its acquisition of Crunchy Data validates Postgres's strategic importance, which is an alternative to MongoDB.
relationships.original_sentence: Snowflake’s purchase of Crunchy Data and Databricks’ acquisition of Neon further validate the market perception of Postgres as a strategic anchor for transactional and AI workloads.

relationships.relationship_description: Crunchy Data, acquired by Snowflake, is related to Postgres, an alternative database technology.
relationships.original_sentence: Snowflake’s purchase of Crunchy Data and Databricks’ acquisition of Neon further validate the market perception of Postgres as a strategic anchor for transactional and AI workloads.

relationships.relationship_description: Databricks is a data platform company that acquired Neon, validating Postgres's strategic importance, which is an alternative to MongoDB.
relationships.original_sentence: Snowflake’s purchase of Crunchy Data and Databricks’ acquisition of Neon further validate the market perception of Postgres as a strategic anchor for transactional and AI workloads.

relationships.relationship_description: Neon, acquired by Databricks, is related to Postgres, an alternative database technology.
relationships.original_sentence: Snowflake’s purchase of Crunchy Data and Databricks’ acquisition of Neon further validate the market perception of Postgres as a strategic anchor for transactional and AI workloads.

relationships.relationship_description: Hyperscalers are both MongoDB’s most important partners (providing cloud platforms) and most capable competitors (bundling native databases and AI services).
relationships.quantifier: most important partners and its most capable competitors
relationships.original_sentence: Hyperscalers are both MongoDB’s most important partners and its most capable competitors.

relationships.relationship_description: Couchbase is a database vendor that hit a growth wall, contrasting with MongoDB's growth.
relationships.original_sentence: While many database vendors hit a growth wall (Couchbase, MarkLogic, Datastax) and consolidated, MongoDB has reached critical mass as a pure-play OLTP platform due to its innovation cadence and developer affinity and, in our view, is positioned to improve its share of net new workloads over time as it leans into enterprise accounts, multi-cloud neutrality, and an integrated feature set that reduces the number of systems teams need to run.

relationships.relationship_description: MarkLogic is a database vendor that hit a growth wall, contrasting with MongoDB's growth.
relationships.original_sentence: While many database vendors hit a growth wall (Couchbase, MarkLogic, Datastax) and consolidated, MongoDB has reached critical mass as a pure-play OLTP platform due to its innovation cadence and developer affinity and, in our view, is positioned to improve its share of net new workloads over time as it leans into enterprise accounts, multi-cloud neutrality, and an integrated feature set that reduces the number of systems teams need to run.

relationships.relationship_description: Datastax is a database vendor that hit a growth wall, contrasting with MongoDB's growth.
relationships.original_sentence: While many database vendors hit a growth wall (Couchbase, MarkLogic, Datastax) and consolidated, MongoDB has reached critical mass as a pure-play OLTP platform due to its innovation cadence and developer affinity and, in our view, is positioned to improve its share of net new workloads over time as it leans into enterprise accounts, multi-cloud neutrality, and an integrated feature set that reduces the number of systems teams need to run.

relationships.relationship_description: MongoDB acquired Voyage AI in Feb. 2025 to integrate embedding and reranking models.
relationships.original_sentence: The Feb. 2025 Voyage AI acquisition tightens this loop.

relationships.relationship_description: Roughly 8,000 startups are building on the MongoDB platform.
relationships.original_sentence: MongoDB has roughly 8,000 startups building on the platform (as of Aug. 2025), 200K new developer registrations monthly and 30% of Atlas ARR is generated from customers with at least one AI use case.

relationships.relationship_description: LangChain is a major ecosystem player partnering with MongoDB to help customers.
relationships.original_sentence: We see MongoDB’s broader emphasis on expanding its partner set with major ecosystem players – LangChain, Galileo, Temporal, Vercel, Anthropic, Cohere – helping customers shorten time-to-production by pairing the platform with critical tools and services in the AI value chain.

relationships.relationship_description: Galileo is a major ecosystem player partnering with MongoDB to help customers.
relationships.original_sentence: We see MongoDB’s broader emphasis on expanding its partner set with major ecosystem players – LangChain, Galileo, Temporal, Vercel, Anthropic, Cohere – helping customers shorten time-to-production by pairing the platform with critical tools and services in the AI value chain.

relationships.relationship_description: Cohere is a major ecosystem player partnering with MongoDB to help customers.
relationships.original_sentence: We see MongoDB’s broader emphasis on expanding its partner set with major ecosystem players – LangChain, Galileo, Temporal, Vercel, Anthropic, Cohere – helping customers shorten time-to-production by pairing the platform with critical tools and services in the AI value chain.

relationships.relationship_description: Oracle is a relational database incumbent and Hyperscaler, posing competitive pressure, and is listed in MongoDB's software coverage universe.
relationships.original_sentence: Key downside risks include: 1) Increased competitive pressure from relational database incumbents, particularly from Hyperscalers like Oracle, Microsoft, AWS, and GCP
